title: Hanging Chair and Table Cart - Double Tier
features: The Hanging Chair and Table Cart is built to streamline transport for event pros who need speed, safety, and serious capacity.
This modified double-tier model holds up to 60 Plastic Folding Chairs, 36 Resin Folding Chairs or Wood Folding Chairs, and 12 standard banquet tables in one compact unit.
The hanger frame can now be positioned at the bottom level, giving crews more flexibility when loading different gear combinations.
Extended side frames add stability for heavier loads, and reinforced crossbeam connections reduce movement and increase overall strength.
To prevent gear from shifting during transit, eight steel barrier pins have been added at the ends of the chair hangers.
Two integrated hook points also allow bungee straps to secure the tables tightly, making transport safer and more secure across any surface.
With thoughtful improvements and rugged construction, this cart helps crews move faster, protect equipment, and cut down on trips between the truck and venue.

Performance Highlights• Holds up to 60 plastic folding chairs, 48 Resin Folding Chairs, 48 Wood Folding Chairs, and 12 banquet tables• Dual-level storage design maximizes efficiency• Narrow profile fits through standard doorways• Heavy-duty steel construction with smooth-rolling swivel casters• Designed for quick setups, safe movement, and long service life

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k
